description: Fix voice emotion analysis (missing audio libraries on Railway deploy) and improve Android BLE Muse connection reliability

userStories.title: Add librosa and soundfile to requirements.deploy.txt
userStories.description: As a user, I want the voice emotion analysis to work in production so I get real emotion results instead of 'No audio processing library available'.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'librosa>=0.10.0' to ml/requirements.deploy.txt
Add 'soundfile>=0.12.0' to ml/requirements.deploy.txt
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add libsndfile1 system dependency to ml/Dockerfile
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the soundfile Python package to have its C library available in the Docker image.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'libsndfile1-dev' to the apt-get install line in ml/Dockerfile
The Dockerfile still builds successfully (RUN pip install line succeeds)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add voice-watch status endpoint smoke test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a quick way to verify librosa and soundfile are importable on the deployed backend.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/voice-watch/status endpoint in ml/api/routes/voice_watch.py already exists
Verify that the endpoint returns librosa_available: true when librosa is installed
Add a test file ml/tests/test_voice_watch_deps.py that imports soundfile and librosa and asserts they are importable
Test passes locally: python -m pytest ml/tests/test_voice_watch_deps.py -v
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Simplify Android BLE GATT connection — remove unnecessary delays
userStories.description: As an Android user, I want the Muse to connect quickly without long waits and unnecessary re-pairing flows.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/lib/muse-ble.ts _connectWebBluetooth(), detect Android via /Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)
On Android: skip the device.forget() + re-request flow entirely (this API doesn't exist on Android Chrome)
On Android: use shorter retry delays [500, 1000, 2000] instead of [2000, 4000, 6000]
On Android: show Android-specific error message mentioning Location Services requirement
On macOS: keep existing behavior (forget + re-request + longer delays)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The current code already has this fix from commit 7e16750 — verify it is correct and working. If the code already matches these criteria, mark as passes:true.

userStories.title: Add BLE connection timeout and auto-retry UI in StudySession muse-pair phase
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want clear feedback if BLE connection fails with a one-tap retry button.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/pages/study/StudySession.tsx muse-pair phase, if connect() throws, show the error message in a red Card below the Pair button
Add a 'Try Again' button that calls connect('muse_2') again
Show the error message from the caught error (not a generic message)
If deviceState goes to 'error', show the error and the retry button
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Android BLE troubleshooting card to muse-pair phase
userStories.description: As an Android user, I want to see Android-specific troubleshooting steps when BLE fails.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySession.tsx muse-pair phase, detect Android via /Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)
When on Android and not connected, show a small Card with tips: 'Turn on Location Services', 'Use Chrome browser', 'Unpair Muse from Android Bluetooth settings first'
Card is dismissible (X button or 'Got it' link)
Card only shows on Android, not on desktop
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove last-resort placeholder from voice_watch.py
userStories.description: As a researcher, I do not want fake uniform probabilities returned when voice analysis fails — show the error instead.
acceptanceCriteria: In ml/api/routes/voice_watch.py, remove the last-resort placeholder block (lines ~180-188) that returns uniform 1/6 probabilities with model_type 'voice_unavailable'
Instead, if result is None after all attempts, raise HTTPException(503, 'Voice emotion analysis failed — model could not process audio')
The frontend already handles non-200 responses by showing the error message
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This follows the CLAUDE.md rule: 'NEVER use placeholder/hardcoded values for real data'

userStories.title: Voice+Watch analyzer: show better error messages and loading state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what went wrong when voice analysis fails instead of a cryptic error.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/components/voice-watch-analyzer.tsx, when analyzeVoiceWatch throws, parse the error message
If error contains 'audio processing library', show: 'Voice analysis is temporarily unavailable. The server is missing required audio libraries.'
If error contains '503', show: 'Voice analysis server is not ready. Please try again in a moment.'
Show a progress indicator during the 30-second recording (e.g. 'Recording... 12s / 30s')
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The component already shows seconds/RECORD_SECONDS — verify this is working correctly

userStories.title: Add Web Bluetooth availability check with user-friendly message
userStories.description: As a user on an unsupported browser (Safari, Firefox), I want to see why Muse pairing is unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/lib/muse-ble.ts, at the top of _connectWebBluetooth(), check if navigator.bluetooth exists
If not, throw Error('Web Bluetooth is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome on desktop or Android.')
In StudySession.tsx muse-pair phase, show this error clearly instead of a blank fail
On iOS Safari, the message should mention 'Use the Bluefy browser or the native app'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Ensure voice recording duration is 30 seconds everywhere
userStories.description: As a user, I want the voice recording to be 30 seconds for better emotion detection accuracy.
acceptanceCriteria: client/src/components/voice-watch-analyzer.tsx: RECORD_SECONDS = 30
client/src/hooks/use-voice-emotion.ts: durationMs default = 30000
Both files have consistent documentation matching the 30-second duration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This was already fixed in commit 7e16750 — verify and mark passes:true if correct
